title: Sync conflict resolution and cleanup
goal: Register onSyncDownload listener for non-duplicate pairs with union-merge conflict resolution, and add key-based cleanup for merged/deleted items in SyncedSettings.
in_scope: Register onSyncDownload listener for zoplicate-nonDuplicates setting
Implement refreshLocalFromSync(libraryID, payload) with key-to-itemID resolution, diff, apply
Extend whenItemsDeleted to also clean SyncedSettings pairs
Flag-based listener disposal (no removeListener API available)
Tests: union merge, conflict flag handling, orphan cleanup, refreshLocalFromSync with key resolution
out_of_scope: Timestamp-based merge (union is sufficient for v1)
acceptance: When conflict=false, refreshLocalFromSync is called with the new remote value
When conflict=true, listener writes back union-merged result then refreshes local
Deleting item with key K removes all pairs containing K from SyncedSettings
refreshLocalFromSync correctly resolves keys to itemIDs and updates local DB
Keys that cannot be resolved are skipped gracefully
